sectionCopy.sources: Inspect source provider status, capabilities, sync progress, and recent failures.
sectionCopy.projects: Map each GitHub repository or GitLab project to the DotCraft workspace it should run against.
sectionCopy.credentials: Manage source identity and secret presence without exposing plaintext.

schedule.defaultDisabledReason: Configure read sync before enabling scheduled sync.
schedule.customInterval: Custom scheduled sync interval in minutes

syncPanel.pendingRestart: Saved source changes need a restart before Sync now can use them.

projects.sourceProjectsDescription: Map GitHub repositories and GitLab projects to DotCraft workspaces.

card.canonicalHint: Canonical source id will appear after a project path is set.

installations.title: GitHub installation profiles
installations.description: Profiles are shared by repositories under the same GitHub owner.

workspacePicker.unavailable: Folder picker is available in the desktop app

github.title: GitHub credentials
github.description: Secrets are submitted once and never echoed back.
github.authenticationDescription: Resolved credential shape; values are redacted.
github.writesDescription: Issue comments, PR reviews, check runs, and Auto PR delivery.

gitlab.title: GitLab
gitlab.description: Token-based import, review publication, and merge request delivery.
gitlab.readSyncDescription: Controls GitLab issue and MR import.
gitlab.writesDescription: Issue notes, MR notes, discussions, commit status, and MR delivery.
gitlab.endpointHostChange: Changing host clears GitLab project profiles on save; new profiles are required after restart.
gitlab.authenticationDescription: Resolved token presence; values are redacted.
gitlab.writeCredentialsDescription: GitLab writes happen as the configured token identity.
gitlab.webhookVerificationDescription: Signing tokens are preferred; secret tokens remain supported.

secret.newValue: New value will be encrypted automatically.
secret.configured: Configured. Enter a new value to replace it.
secret.empty: Empty. Enter a value to configure it.

connection.title: Agent connection
connection.restartDescription: Changes apply after Oratorio server restart.
connection.appServerUrlDescription: Absolute ws or wss endpoint used when Hub discovery is unavailable.
connection.hubDiscoveryDescription: Allows Oratorio to discover AppServer endpoints through DotCraft Hub.
connection.hubLockPathDescription: Optional absolute path to DotCraft Hub workspace lock data.
connection.approvalPolicyDescription: Prompt guard policy for new DotCraft threads.

group.title: Worktrees and scheduling
group.restartDescription: Changes affect new scheduling and worktree cleanup decisions after restart.

worktree.managedWorktreesDescription: Prepare DotCraft runs in Oratorio-managed worktrees.
worktree.worktreeRootDescription: Absolute root path, or blank for each workspace default.
worktree.concurrencyDescription: Global, per repository, and per source active run limits.
worktree.retriesDescription: Attempts plus initial and maximum backoff.
worktree.stallTimeoutDescription: How long a silent active run can continue before being treated as stalled.
worktree.retentionDescription: How long successful and failed worktrees are kept.
worktree.cleanupWorkerDescription: Enable cleanup and set the worker interval.

automation.title: Automation policy
automation.autoDispatchWithGitlab: Starts eligible GitHub/GitLab issues and local tasks when allow/block labels permit it.
automation.autoDispatchDefault: Starts eligible GitHub issues and local tasks when allow/block labels permit it.
automation.allowLabelsDescription: Empty means every unblocked eligible item may run.
automation.blockLabelsDescription: Any matching label prevents implementation auto-dispatch.
automation.implementationTurnsDescription: Maximum continuation turns before an implementation run finishes without a draft.
automation.deliveryWithGitlab: Default delivery policy for auto-dispatched implementation items. Auto delivery creates a GitHub PR or GitLab MR from the origin project.
automation.deliveryDefault: Default delivery policy for auto-dispatched implementation items.

group.title: Automatic review
group.descriptionWithGitlab: Project-level PR/MR review triggers and draft publication policy.
group.descriptionDefault: Repository-level PR review triggers and draft publication policy.

review.autoReviewWithGitlab: Automatically queues read-only PR/MR reviews for enabled projects.
review.autoReviewDefault: Automatically queues read-only PR reviews for enabled repositories.
review.reviewSupportsWithGitlab: GitHub PRs and GitLab MRs support head-SHA re-review.
review.publishWithGitlab: Publishes valid Review Drafts through the provider-specific route for selected projects.
review.publishDefault: Publishes valid Review Drafts as GitHub COMMENT reviews only.
review.followUpAllowlistDescription: When a generated pull request gains unresolved review findings or new human review comments, automatically re-implements the originating issue/task and pushes follow-up commits to the same pull request.
review.followUpRoundsDescription: Upper bound on automatic implementation follow-up rounds per originating item before the loop stops.

modal.autoReviewDescription: Select source projects to enable automatic {{term}} reviews.
modal.publishDescription: Select source projects whose Review Drafts may be published through {{route}}.
modal.followUpDescription: Select source projects whose generated pull requests may trigger automatic implementation follow-up.
modal.noMatch: No source projects match your search.

providerReasons.webhookInDiagnostics: Webhook status is available in diagnostics when configured.
providerReasons.gitlabReadRequiresTokens: GitLab read sync requires project profile tokens.
providerReasons.gitlabWritesRequireTokens: GitLab writes require project profile tokens.
providerReasons.gitlabWebhookUnconfigured: GitLab webhook verification is not configured.
providerReasons.gitlabProjectTokenMissing: GitLab project profile token is missing.
providerReasons.gitlabProjectWebhookUnconfigured: GitLab project webhook verification is not configured.
